execution_history.reason: Final V3 portfolio fails to meet all hard portfolio construction constraints due to negative beta and excessive short allocation in several names. Remedial adjustments required before sign-off.
Final V3 portfolio fails to meet all hard portfolio construction constraints due to negative beta and excessive short allocation in several names. Remedial adjustments required before sign-off.

observations: Final V3 portfolio: 16 longs, 10 shorts (meets hard count constraints)
Short allocation for some names (PM, CHD, CLX) exceed 5%, violating short allocation cap constraint
Portfolio beta remains negative (beta: -0.03) in direct violation of hard constraint (must be > 0.175 and < 0.3, positive)

execution_history.reason: Remediation required: Looping process to enforce beta and short allocation caps for final compliance.
Remediation required: Looping process to enforce beta and short allocation caps for final compliance.

observations: Hard-constraint violation: Portfolio beta is negative (-0.03, must be 0.175-0.3 and non-negative).
Short allocations for PM (14.5%), CHD (18.8%), CLX (15.7%), and other names are above the liquid/illiquid cap (5%/3%).

Next steps: Loop back to Task 8 for targeted changes—reduce/eliminate outsized shorts, upweight market beta contributors, verify beta in-range post-adjustment, and maintain required long/short counts and diversification.

execution_history.reason: Final portfolio presented in JSON per schema, matching allocations to V3 build. All entries evidence-driven per constraints, but hard-constraint violation (beta negative, excessive short caps) flagged for further iteration.
